Event: Magic Well - May 2024
Event Date: 04/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM20


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Target Setter's Signet Amulet

Once in a while, increases physical and magic armor of the unit and all allies in a small radius around them by 100% for 4 sec.
If a movement-restricting effect, stun, freeze, or petrification is applied to an enhanced unit, their physical and magic armor is additionally increased by 100% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
